task.prompt:
Visit the top 2 closed pull requests on this page and read off each                                                                                        
  PR's author username. For each author, open                                            
  https://www.google.com/search?q=<author>+site%3Alinkedin.com in the                                                                                        
  browser, click the first result whose URL contains linkedin.com/in/,                                                                                       
  and take a viewport screenshot of the LinkedIn profile page. Save                                                                                          
  each screenshot under a folder named after the repo slug                                                                                                   
  (input_data.repo with "/" replaced by "-"). Read the profile and                                                                                           
  return one item per author with repo, author, linkedin_url, school                                                                                         
  (most recent education entry), current_company (top role in the                                                                                            
  experience section), and tenure (how long at that company, e.g.                                                                                            
  "2 yrs 3 mos").
